cycle_history.note: cot-fidelity Pivot_Score 8.85 — TIES chain-probe (cycle 017), second-highest in BibleWorld history. PAT-059 is the first perfect pattern (10.0/10). The counterfactual faithfulness test derives directly from Genesis 3:1-6 structural observation: Eve's stated reasoning chain (prohibition, v.3) was not causally active — her actual decision was driven by three factors in v.6. Anthropic documented the same pattern in LLMs in 2025. cot-fidelity operationalizes the test. [WEB-FRESH 2026-03-31] Gap confirmed across all 5 major observability suites. Fortune March 2026 confirms market. Eleven tools in pipeline. Total Level 3 patterns: 28. Total builds: 17.
